name: Export Pipeline - Request Processor
description: Flexible multi-stage engine for calling external APIs with dynamic data, authentication, and response handling - all configured via JSON.
guide:
This extension enables complex API integrations through a configurable multi-stage workflow engine.

To set up, you need to:

  • Define stages that execute sequentially, each with optional evaluate, get_content, and call_api phases
  • Configure request objects with URL, method, headers, and content using dynamic templating
  • Set up response_handlers to extract values using JMESPath, XPath, or regex and write to fields or properties

How it works:

  • Use {variable.path} syntax to inject dynamic values from payload, fields, or properties
  • Add evaluate conditions to skip stages when criteria aren't met
  • Use get_content to fetch data from relations or documents before API calls
  • Configure auth with automatic token caching and refresh on 401 responses
  • Use iterate_over to loop requests over line items or lists
  • Extract response values with $jmespath, $xmlpath, or $regex operators

Supports JSON, form data, file uploads, and multipart content types.

For more information, take a look at our documentation.
